title: Travel, Services, and Weather Updates
transcript: You're going to hear five short texts. You will hear each text twice. After you've listened to each text, decide if the statement for each of the items, 56 to 60, is true or not true. Mark your answer on the answer sheet. Now read number 56. Now listen to the text. Attention passengers for the 10.30 ferry to Dublin. Due to high winds, this crossing has been delayed by two hours. Please remain in the departure lounge where coffee and tea are available. Passengers traveling with cars should return to their vehicles 30 minutes before the new departure time. We apologize for the delay. Listen to the text a second time. Attention passengers for the 10.30 ferry to Dublin. Due to high winds, this crossing has been delayed by two hours. Please remain in the departure lounge where coffee and tea are available. Passengers traveling with cars should return to their vehicles 30 minutes before the new departure time. We apologize for the delay. Now read number 57. Now listen to the text. You have reached Dr. Miller's dental practice. We are currently closed for lunch between 1 o'clock p.m. and 2 o'clock p.m. If you would like to make an appointment, please call back after 2 o'clock. In case of a severe dental emergency, please contact the central hospital on 555-0199. Thank you. Listen to the text a second time. You have reached Dr. Miller's dental practice. We are currently closed for lunch between 1 o'clock p.m. and 2 o'clock p.m. If you would like to make an appointment, please call back after 2 o'clock. In case of a severe dental emergency, please contact the central hospital on 555-0199. Thank you. Now read number 58. Now listen to the text. Welcome back to Garden Talk. I'm afraid our usual host, Sarah Green, is unwell today, so I'm Peter Jones sitting in for her. We won't be discussing rose planting as advertised. Instead, we have a special guest to talk about growing vegetables in small spaces. Stay tuned for some great tips. Listen to the text a second time. Welcome back to Garden Talk. I'm afraid our usual host, Sarah Green, is unwell today, so I'm Peter Jones sitting in for her. We won't be discussing rose planting as advertised. Instead, we have a special guest to talk about growing vegetables in small spaces. Stay tuned for some great tips. Now read number 59. Now listen to the text. Ladies and gentlemen, the store will be closing in 15 minutes. Please make your final selection and move to the cash desks on the ground floor. The exit on High Street is now locked for security reasons, so please use the main doors near the car park. Thank you for shopping with us. Listen to the text a second time. Ladies and gentlemen, the store will be closing in 15 minutes. Please make your final selection and move to the cash desks on the ground floor. The exit on High Street is now locked for security reasons, so please use the main doors near the car park. Thank you for shopping with us. Now read number 60. Now listen to the text. Here is the forecast for the weekend. Saturday looks promising with warm temperatures and plenty of sunshine, perfect for a picnic. However, things will change overnight. Sunday will be much colder with heavy rain expected throughout the day, so make sure to keep your umbrellas ready. Listen to the text a second time. Here is the forecast for the weekend. Saturday looks promising with warm temperatures and plenty of sunshine, perfect for a picnic. However, things will change overnight. Sunday will be much colder with heavy rain expected throughout the day, so make sure to keep your umbrellas ready. Now you have one minute to check your answers again.

statements.statement: The ferry to Dublin is cancelled.
statements.audio_transcript: Attention passengers for the 10.30 ferry to Dublin. Due to high winds, this crossing has been delayed by two hours. Please remain in the departure lounge where coffee and tea are available. Passengers traveling with cars should return to their vehicles 30 minutes before the new departure time. We apologize for the delay.

explanation.de: FALSCH. Die Fähre wurde nicht gestrichen, sondern nur «um zwei Stunden verspätet». Die Passagiere sollen in der Abflughalle warten und sich 30 Minuten vor der neuen Abfahrtszeit bereit machen.
explanation.en: INCORRECT. The ferry is not cancelled but only 'delayed by two hours'. Passengers are told to remain in the departure lounge and return to vehicles 30 minutes before the new departure time.
explanation.ar: خطأ. لم تُلغَ العبّارة بل 'تأخرت ساعتين' فقط. يُطلب من المسافرين البقاء في صالة المغادرة والعودة لسياراتهم قبل 30 دقيقة من موعد الإبحار الجديد.
explanation.fr: FAUX. Le ferry n'est pas annulé, il est seulement 'retardé de deux heures'. Les passagers doivent rester dans la salle d'embarquement et revenir à leurs véhicules 30 minutes avant le nouveau départ.
explanation.es: INCORRECTO. El ferry no está cancelado, solo 'retrasado dos horas'. Se pide a los pasajeros que permanezcan en la sala de embarque y vuelvan a sus vehículos 30 minutos antes de la nueva hora de salida.
explanation.ru: НЕПРАВИЛЬНО. Паром не отменён, а лишь 'задержан на два часа'. Пассажирам предлагают оставаться в зале ожидания и вернуться к машинам за 30 минут до нового времени отправления.

statements.statement: The dental practice is closed for a lunch break.
statements.audio_transcript: You have reached Dr. Miller's dental practice. We are currently closed for lunch between 1 o'clock p.m. and 2 o'clock p.m. If you would like to make an appointment, please call back after 2 o'clock. In case of a severe dental emergency, please contact the central hospital on 555-0199.

explanation.de: RICHTIG. Im Audio heißt es: «Wir haben zurzeit Mittagspause, von 13 bis 14 Uhr geschlossen.» Die Praxis ist wegen einer Mittagspause geschlossen.
explanation.en: CORRECT. The audio says 'We are currently closed for lunch between 1 o'clock p.m. and 2 o'clock p.m.' The practice is closed for a lunch break.
explanation.ar: صحيح. يقول التسجيل 'نحن مغلقون حالياً لاستراحة الغداء من الساعة 1 ظهراً حتى 2 ظهراً.' العيادة مغلقة بسبب استراحة الغداء.
explanation.fr: CORRECT. L'audio dit : 'Nous sommes actuellement fermés pour le déjeuner entre 13h et 14h.' Le cabinet est fermé pour la pause déjeuner.
explanation.es: CORRECTO. El audio dice 'Estamos cerrados actualmente por almuerzo entre la 1 y las 2 de la tarde.' La consulta está cerrada por pausa del almuerzo.
explanation.ru: ПРАВИЛЬНО. В аудио говорится: 'Мы сейчас закрыты на обед с 13:00 до 14:00.' Практика закрыта на обеденный перерыв.

statements.statement: The radio show will be about planting roses.
statements.audio_transcript: Welcome back to Garden Talk. I'm afraid our usual host, Sarah Green, is unwell today, so I'm Peter Jones sitting in for her. We won't be discussing rose planting as advertised. Instead, we have a special guest to talk about growing vegetables in small spaces.

explanation.de: FALSCH. Im Audio heißt es ausdrücklich: «Wir werden nicht wie angekündigt über Rosenpflanzen sprechen.» Stattdessen geht es um den Gemüseanbau auf kleinem Raum.
explanation.en: INCORRECT. The audio explicitly says 'We won't be discussing rose planting as advertised. Instead, we have a special guest to talk about growing vegetables in small spaces.'
explanation.ar: خطأ. يقول التسجيل صراحة 'لن نناقش زراعة الورود كما أُعلن. بدلاً من ذلك، لدينا ضيف خاص للحديث عن زراعة الخضروات في المساحات الصغيرة.'
explanation.fr: FAUX. L'audio dit explicitement : 'Nous ne parlerons pas de la plantation de roses comme prévu. À la place, nous avons un invité spécial pour parler de la culture de légumes dans de petits espaces.'
explanation.es: INCORRECTO. El audio dice explícitamente 'No hablaremos sobre plantar rosas como se anunció. En cambio, tenemos un invitado especial para hablar sobre cultivar verduras en espacios pequeños.'
explanation.ru: НЕПРАВИЛЬНО. В аудио прямо говорится: 'Мы не будем обсуждать посадку роз, как было объявлено. Вместо этого у нас специальный гость, который расскажет о выращивании овощей на маленьких площадях.'

statements.statement: Customers can leave through the High Street exit.
statements.audio_transcript: Ladies and gentlemen, the store will be closing in 15 minutes. Please make your final selection and move to the cash desks on the ground floor. The exit on High Street is now locked for security reasons, so please use the main doors near the car park.

explanation.de: FALSCH. Im Audio heißt es: «Der Ausgang zur High Street ist jetzt aus Sicherheitsgründen abgeschlossen.» Kunden müssen den Haupteingang beim Parkplatz benutzen.
explanation.en: INCORRECT. The audio says 'The exit on High Street is now locked for security reasons, so please use the main doors near the car park.' The High Street exit is not available.
explanation.ar: خطأ. يقول التسجيل 'مخرج شارع هاي ستريت مغلق الآن لأسباب أمنية، يرجى استخدام الأبواب الرئيسية بالقرب من موقف السيارات.' مخرج هاي ستريت غير متاح.
explanation.fr: FAUX. L'audio dit : 'La sortie sur High Street est maintenant verrouillée pour des raisons de sécurité, veuillez utiliser les portes principales près du parking.' La sortie High Street n'est pas disponible.
explanation.es: INCORRECTO. El audio dice 'La salida de High Street está cerrada por razones de seguridad, por favor usen las puertas principales cerca del aparcamiento.' La salida de High Street no está disponible.
explanation.ru: НЕПРАВИЛЬНО. В аудио говорится: 'Выход на Хай-стрит заперт по соображениям безопасности, пожалуйста, используйте главные двери у парковки.' Выход на Хай-стрит недоступен.

statements.statement: The weather will be sunny on Saturday but rainy on Sunday.
statements.audio_transcript: Here is the forecast for the weekend. Saturday looks promising with warm temperatures and plenty of sunshine, perfect for a picnic. However, things will change overnight. Sunday will be much colder with heavy rain expected throughout the day, so make sure to keep your umbrellas ready.

explanation.de: RICHTIG. Im Audio heißt es: «Samstag wird warm mit viel Sonnenschein», aber «Sonntag wird viel kälter mit starkem Regen den ganzen Tag.» Also sonnig am Samstag, regnerisch am Sonntag.
explanation.en: CORRECT. The audio says 'Saturday looks promising with warm temperatures and plenty of sunshine' but 'Sunday will be much colder with heavy rain expected throughout the day.'
explanation.ar: صحيح. يقول التسجيل 'السبت يبدو واعداً بدرجات حرارة دافئة وكثير من أشعة الشمس' لكن 'الأحد سيكون أبرد بكثير مع أمطار غزيرة متوقعة طوال اليوم.'
explanation.fr: CORRECT. L'audio dit : 'Samedi s'annonce prometteur avec des températures chaudes et beaucoup de soleil' mais 'dimanche sera beaucoup plus froid avec de fortes pluies attendues toute la journée.'
explanation.es: CORRECTO. El audio dice 'El sábado parece prometedor con temperaturas cálidas y mucho sol' pero 'el domingo será mucho más frío con lluvias fuertes esperadas durante todo el día.'
explanation.ru: ПРАВИЛЬНО. В аудио говорится: 'Суббота обещает тёплую погоду и много солнца', но 'воскресенье будет намного холоднее с сильным дождём в течение всего дня.'
